name: pocock-local
description: A lean, CI-trusting companion to the Matt Pocock engineering skills in LOCAL-FILES mode. Mirrors the GitHub issues assigned to you into local markdown (read-only), and runs a test-driven ship flow — scope with grilling, plan, design failing tests, implement to green, confirm, open a PR — that leans on CI for the regression gate instead of re-implementing contracts, stop rules, or a mutation grader. Auto-routes stages to claude-fable-5 when available.
